title: Report Content
description: Report potentially illegal or inappropriate content on adinfinity website.
meta_description: Report potentially illegal or inappropriate content on adinfinity website.

hero.title: Report Content
hero.subtitle: Help us keep our online environment safe
hero.description: If you encounter content that violates our terms of service or is illegal/inappropriate, please report it immediately.

info.follow_up: We may contact you for additional information

success.title: Report Submitted
success.message: Your report has been successfully submitted. We will review it as soon as possible.

error.title: Submission Error
error.message: An error occurred while submitting your report. Please try again.

subject: Subject:
content_review_desc: Our compliance team reviews the reported content against our policies and applicable laws
action_taken_desc: Content may be removed, restricted, or left in place based on our review
response_sent_desc: We inform you of our decision and any actions taken
protection_description: We are committed to protecting reporters and ensuring a safe reporting process:
confidentiality_desc: Your identity and report details are kept confidential
no_retaliation_desc: We prohibit retaliation against good-faith reporters
anonymous_reporting_desc: You can report content anonymously if preferred
legal_protection_desc: Good-faith reporters are protected under applicable laws
